crises.title: U.S. Strikes Iran After Attack in Strait of Hormuz
crises.summary: The U.S. conducted strikes on Iranian military sites in retaliation for a drone attack on a cargo ship in the Strait of Hormuz. Iran has vowed a swift response.

crises.title: Ukraine Launches Major Drone Attack on Russia
crises.summary: Ukraine executed one of its largest drone assaults, targeting multiple regions in Russia and Crimea, with reports of 660 drones intercepted by Russian defenses.

crises.title: Ebola Outbreak Declared Emergency in DRC and Uganda
crises.summary: The WHO declared the Ebola outbreak caused by the Bundibugyo virus in DRC and Uganda a public health emergency, with over 1,000 confirmed cases reported.

crises.title: Hezbollah Supporters Riot in Beirut
crises.summary: Supporters of Hezbollah rioted in Beirut following a framework deal between Israel and Lebanon, blocking roads and causing unrest.

crises.title: Hundreds Detained in Kenya Protests
crises.summary: Police detained hundreds during protests marking the anniversary of deadly anti-government demonstrations in 2024, demanding justice for victims.
